responses.text: In 2008, Britney Spears was placed under a court-ordered conservatorship following publicized concerns about her mental health.
The conservatorship gave her father, Jamie Spears, extensive control over her career, finances, and personal decisions.
The February 2021 documentary 'Framing Britney Spears' renewed widespread public attention on the restrictive arrangement and the #FreeBritney movement.
Spears strongly opposed her father's role as conservator, and her legal team repeatedly asked the court to limit his control and remove him entirely.
In September 2021, a judge ruled in her favor and suspended Jamie Spears from his role as conservator of her estate.
The court officially terminated the entire 13-year conservatorship in November 2021, marking the end of the legal battle described in the target article.
